## Release notes

Merged PRs appear in [GitHub Releases](https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/releasing-projects-on-github/automatically-generated-release-notes) when we tag `v*`. Add **one** label so the change is grouped correctly:

| Change type | Label |
|-------------|--------|
| Bug fix | `bug` or `fix` |
| Feature | `enhancement` or `feature` |
| Docs only | `documentation` or `docs` |
| Deps bump | `dependencies` |
| Chore / CI / refactor | `chore`, `ci`, or `refactor` |
| Skip release notes | `ignore-for-release` |

PR titles like `fix: …` / `feat: …` help reviewers; **labels** drive the published release categories.
